_title: NR4A3 ternary-cooperativity method — FROZEN preregistration criteria (machine-readable)
_frozen: 2026-07-11 (before any ternary GPU spend; reviewer 'APPROVED WITH SCOPE CHANGES', hardened after 'RETURN FOR FIXES')
_status: STAGE-0 FREEZE. No MD/FEP/GPU/AWS run for the ternary path. Every numeric threshold below is an a-priori design parameter, NOT a result. The gate script ternary_coop_gate.py enforces §3 against a future results dict so no criterion is re-decided post-hoc; it computes class-correctness / Kendall tau-b / LOO from per-system records rather than trusting supplied summary counts, rejects non-finite numbers, and fails closed on missing safety booleans.
_scope: Track B (ternary / induced-proximity) ONLY. Does NOT touch Track A / ABFE / the denovo_401 lambda-repair.

method.reviewer_choice: (ii) relative ternary free energy implementing (iii) cooperativity via a binary-vs-ternary cycle; (i) ternary-MD + interface MM-GBSA is subordinate (ensemble/diagnostic only)
method.estimator: matched relative alchemical calcs in binary AND ternary environments; ddG_coop = ddG_alch_ternary - ddG_alch_binary
method.uncertainty_estimator: replicate standard deviation across >=3 independent replicas (NOT MBAR standard error); small-n handled with t-statistics on the replicate SD
perturbation_types: staged protein/interface perturbations where technically tractable (cross-paralogue coupling)
method.precedent_caveat: combined ligand+protein FEP precedent exists for molecular GLUES; transfer to bifunctional PROTACs is itself UNVALIDATED here and is what Layer-1 tests.
method.md_role: APPROVED for ensemble generation, pose survival, metastable arrangements, persistent contacts/buried-surface/hydration/interface-frustration/linker-preorganization, pose- and paralogue-dependent failure detection.
method.mmgbsa_role: NOT authorized as a ranking endpoint or gate. Qualitative descriptor ONLY, labeled non-predictive. Basis: 2025 VHL-SMARCA2 study found no correlation between trajectory MM-GBSA cooperativity and measured cooperativity.

layer1_vhl_panel.role: QUANTITATIVE VHL thermodynamic calibration — REQUIRED before relying on NR-V04
layer1_vhl_panel.primary_series: Ciulli-lab SMARCA2-VHL degrader series (structurally characterized ternary complexes; ~alpha 0.2..93; multiple linker/exit-vector arrangements; inactive cis-hydroxyproline stereo controls; long MD showing ensemble diversity)
layer1_vhl_panel.provenance_freeze_blocker: Exact compound identities, PDB IDs, and MEASURED alpha / dG_coop are NOT asserted here and must NOT be fabricated. Extract from primary sources via a CI-runner full-text fetch (egress proxy blocks PMC/NCBI/Springer in-sandbox). Until each system carries a verified primary reference + verified measured alpha, it is provenance:unverified and cannot enter the scored manifest.
layer1_vhl_panel.candidate_systems_workspace_note: A non-scored candidate_systems workspace is acceptable for curation; NO candidate may enter expected_system_ids (the frozen scored manifest) until each is primary-source verified.

curation_status.dossier: layer1-vhl-dossier.json (RCSB + Europe PMC OA full text), fetched via CI (fusion-cpu-extras.yml off this branch); raw dossier on the modalities-cache branch
curation_status.verified_so_far: a real, structurally-characterized SMARCA2-VHL PROTAC series (P1-P5) with measured cooperativity (TR-FRET binary-vs-ternary IC50) and its ORDINAL classes, from Nat Commun 2025 (PMC12480974, DOI 10.1038/s41467-025-63713-7); the alpha definition (binary/ternary Kd ratio) corroborated (PMC13220276); and — importantly — that paper's finding that MMGBSA-derived cooperativity shows NO correlation with measured cooperativity (the empirical basis of method.mmgbsa_role here).
curation_status.still_needed_before_freeze: exact NUMERIC alpha per compound (P1-P5 sit in Fig 1A / Supplementary, NOT in the OA XML body or an inline table -> resisted 3 automated fetch/parse cycles; needs a Supplementary-Data-file parse or a figure read); MZ1/BRD4-VHL numeric alpha; and a verified INACTIVE stereo control compound (cis-Hyp epimer) + its class. Until these are verified, systems + expected_system_ids stay EMPTY (do NOT fabricate).
curation_status.note: the gate currently requires numeric measured_alpha (for Kendall tau-b + class boundaries). tau-b is rank-based, so a future honest option is to score on a VERIFIED ORDINAL rank when the primary source gives classes but not machine-readable numbers -- deferred as a possible gate amendment, NOT done here.

primary_ref.note: Gadd et al. 2017 Nat Chem Biol; resolve exact PMCID + numeric alpha

layer2_nrv04_transfer.role: NR-V04 family transfer test — functional-order concordance, NOT recovery of measured NR-V04 cooperativity (no paralogue-resolved NR-V04 alpha exists)
layer2_nrv04_transfer.chemical_identity_caveat: NR-V04 chemistry in-repo is an 'NR-V04-inspired representative reconstruction' until primary-source structure verification lands (see nrv04-ternary-benchmark.json chemical_identity.blocker).

frozen_manifest._note: Expected system and leg IDs the pilot/retrospective MUST supply. The gate validates results coverage against these. expected_system_ids for Layer-1 is empty until curated+verified (hard blocker); when non-empty the gate enforces required-subset coverage.
frozen_manifest._leg_semantics: each leg is a RELATIVE-alchemical MORPH in ONE environment. Cooperativity uses the binary-vs-ternary cycle: ddG_coop(A->B) = ddG_alch(ternary) - ddG_alch(binary). Calibration pair (hi->lo) needs both binary + ternary legs to recover the known Delta-alpha; NR-V04 active->epimer needs binary (affinity knockout) + ternary-NR4A1 (the coop test). This is the ternary_coop.py PILOT_LEG_MAP; a mismatch between these IDs and that table fails closed.
frozen_manifest.leg_coverage_rule: required-subset: every ternary_pilot_expected_leg_id must appear as a results['legs'][*].name (extra legs allowed)
frozen_manifest.layer1_expected_system_ids_coverage_rule: when calibration.layer1_vhl_panel.expected_system_ids is non-empty, every id must appear (required-subset) among results['vhl_panel']['systems'][*].id

retrospective_bar._note: ALL of technical_convergence + vhl_panel + nrv04_affinity_control + nr4a_family_transfer + ci_coverage must PASS before ANY prospective NR4A3 ternary ranking is trusted.

technical_convergence.safety_boolean_missing_behavior: FAIL closed (a present leg record that omits a required safety attestation is a failure, never silently False)

class_boundaries._note: alpha >= favorable_min => 'cooperative'; alpha <= unfavorable_max => 'anti_cooperative'; strictly between (symmetric ~log2 band around 1) => 'neutral'. Boundaries symmetric in log (0.5 = 1/2.0). Classification uses the POINT estimate; a system whose measured alpha sits in the neutral band has measured class 'neutral' and predicting 'neutral' is correct.

vhl_panel.class_correct_rule: required = max(5, ceil(5/6 * n_systems)); class-correct counted over ALL systems. Scoring systems: predicted class == measured class. Inactive-control systems: correct iff predicted class != 'cooperative' (i.e. predicted non-competent).
vhl_panel.kendall_scope: systems with a finite measured_alpha AND role != 'inactive_control'

composition_required._note: strong_cooperative = measured class 'cooperative'; weak_or_negative = measured class 'neutral' or 'anti_cooperative'; >=1 independent VHL system is MANDATORY (MZ1 preferred and recorded via is_mz1, but any independent_vhl==true system satisfies the count).

vhl_panel.loo_rule: for EVERY single-system exclusion, the remaining (n-1)-panel must still satisfy: class-correct >= max(5, ceil(5/6*(n-1))) AND kendall tau_b >= kendall_tau_min AND no inactive control classified competent. Computed in-gate from per-system records (a supplied 'survives_leave_one_compound_out' boolean is NOT trusted).
vhl_panel.per_system_ci_note: every scoring system record must carry a finite dg_coop_ci_half_width_kcal <= max (covers the 'panel predictions' + 'cooperativity differences' decision-quantity coverage).

nrv04_affinity_control.sign_convention: POSITIVE margin = active favored over epimer by that many kcal/mol
nrv04_affinity_control.interval_rule: ci_low and ci_high finite; ci_low <= ci_high; for the favored-active side the ENTIRE interval must be above zero => ci_low > 0 (a strictly-below-zero interval is a FAILURE, not a pass)

nr4a_family_transfer.sign_convention: POSITIVE = NR4A1 favored over the paralogue by that many kcal/mol
nr4a_family_transfer.interval_rule: ci_lo and ci_hi finite; ci_lo <= ci_hi; the (e.g. 90%) interval must be entirely above zero on the NR4A1-favored side => ci_lo > 0

ci_coverage._note: The 95% CI half-width criterion applies to EVERY decision-bearing quantity, not just per-leg entries. Results must supply a decision_quantities list covering the frozen required IDs (plus, dynamically, one dg_coop entry per VHL scoring system).
ci_coverage.dynamic_coverage_rule: for each VHL scoring system s present in results['vhl_panel']['systems'] (role != 'inactive_control'), a decision_quantity with id 'vhl_dg_coop::<s.id>' must also be present
ci_coverage.entry_rule: each decision_quantity must have finite estimate, ci_lo <= ci_hi (both finite), half_width consistent with (ci_hi-ci_lo)/2 within 0.05 kcal/mol, half_width <= ci_half_width_kcal_max, interval_level == required_interval_level

retrospective_bar.failure_semantics: Failure of nr4a_family_transfer does NOT prove the ternary-first biological thesis false (NR-V04 selectivity could be partly downstream at ubiquitination). It DOES mean the method is NOT validated for prospective NR4A paralogue ranking and must not be manuscript authority for a selectivity claim.

sequencing.stage0_now_free: Freeze method defs + calibration compounds/structures/microstates + force fields + restraints + uncertainty estimator + failure criteria + construct definitions + binary/ternary combination rule (this JSON + the .md).

stage1_parallel_pilots.binary: 5-Br -> 5-NH2 RBFE edge (e_zaienne_cmpd19__cw_ev_5nh2) on one nr4a3_design frame

sequencing.stage2_second_authorization: if binary pilot passes, authorize a SELECTION-oriented RBFE tranche (NOT full 19-cpd fleet): anchor-rooted exit-vector series + defensible SAR-preserving analogues + required microstate legs + NR4A1/2/3 + only gate-surviving conformers; capped to identify ~2-3 warhead/exit-vector hypotheses. Carboxylate bioisosteres stay a SEPARATE pose-revalidation tranche.
sequencing.stage3_ternary_prospective: prospective NR4A3 ternary begins ONLY after vhl_panel + nrv04_affinity_control + nr4a_family_transfer + ci_coverage + technical_convergence all pass
sequencing.stage4_matrix: build the degrader matrix only when 2-3 warheads survive binary RBFE + poses credible + ternary method validated + >=2 exit-vector architectures survive co-fold+ensemble checks

constructs.nr4a_lbd: each paralogue LBD = C-terminal 254 residues; NR4A3 explicit 373-626; NR4A1/NR4A2 identical rule (matches nr4a3_ternary.py / nrv04_ternary.py)
constructs.binary_receptor_axis: frozen nr4a3-conformer-panel.json (druggable 8XTT validation conformers + release held-out ranks 4-6 + matched NR4A1/NR4A2 open frames)
constructs.fusion_context: EWSR1::NR4A3 breakpoint + domain context modeled SEPARATELY from the isolated LBD (declared disordered-domain uncertainty); LBD-local ternary energetics and fusion-context ubiquitination geometry reported as SEPARATE quantities

combination_rule._note: Frozen a priori. S_d is a ranking aid AMONG gate-passing constructs, not the gate. Binary preference (#1) and E3-ligand integrity (#2) are eligibility GATES upstream of S_d, not addends. #3 and #4 enter as SEPARATE terms, never pre-collapsed. This is the FORMAL definition (reviewer fix 7); a light meta-test asserts every field below is present.
combination_rule.form: S_d = min_c [ w_t * m_t(c) + w_c * m_c(c) ] - lambda*SD(c*) - gamma*counterexample - eta*strain_norm - rho*ubiq_incompat
combination_rule.ranking_direction: HIGHER S_d is better (all terms pre-converted so a positive contribution = NR4A3 favored / lower liability)

term_definitions.c: index over the frozen conformer/context ensemble = the role-tagged frames of nr4a3-conformer-panel.json (the same worst-conformer axis ensemble_robust_score.py uses)
term_definitions.min_c: worst-context (most conservative) selection over c; c* = the arg-min context
term_definitions.m_t(c): effective-ternary-recruitment selectivity margin at context c, in kcal/mol, sign-converted so POSITIVE = NR4A3 recruited more favorably than the worst paralogue (= (recruit_NR4A3 - max_paralogue recruit) with the free-energy sign flipped so more-favorable-NR4A3 is positive)
term_definitions.m_c(c): cooperative-coupling selectivity margin at context c, in kcal/mol, POSITIVE = NR4A3 more cooperative than the worst paralogue (dG_coop sign-converted identically)
term_definitions.SD(c*): replicate standard deviation (>=3 replicas) of the bracketed [w_t*m_t + w_c*m_c] quantity evaluated at c* (uncertainty estimator = replicate SD, per method.uncertainty_estimator)
term_definitions.counterexample: max over {NR4A1, NR4A2} of that paralogue's advantage margin (kcal/mol, POSITIVE when a paralogue is favored over NR4A3); the strongest single paralogue counterexample
term_definitions.strain_norm: PROTAC linker strain free energy relative to its unbound conformational ensemble, in kcal/mol (a separate diagnostic, NOT an endpoint interface energy)
term_definitions.ubiq_incompat: ubiquitination-incompatibility score in [0,1] (1 = no transfer-competent lysine geometry); multiplied by rho (kcal/mol per unit) to enter S_d in energy units

combination_rule.units: every additive term is kcal/mol after normalization (ubiq_incompat*rho and eta*strain_norm included); weights carry kcal/mol-per-unit where needed so S_d is dimensionally kcal/mol
combination_rule.missing_data_behavior: if ANY term for a construct is missing/undefined, S_d is UNDEFINED for that construct; it is EXCLUDED from the ranking and flagged, never treated as 0
combination_rule.tie_policy: ties in S_d broken by (1) larger min_c bracketed margin, then (2) smaller SD(c*); residual ties reported as tied (no arbitrary order)
combination_rule.weights_rationale: Deliberately simple, unfitted, transparent a-priori constants (NOT tuned to any result). The two ternary terms weighted equally; penalties modest. Any change is a DATED AMENDMENT to the prereg, not a silent retune. Do NOT fit or retune to retrospective or prospective results.

robustness_requirement.rule: the exact top-k S_d set (as an unordered set of construct IDs) must be IDENTICAL under (a) each one-at-a-time +/-50% single-weight perturbation AND (b) the joint +/-50% perturbation over all corners of the weight hypercube; if the top-k set changes under ANY perturbation, report the ranking as UNRESOLVED rather than as a ranked winner

binary_pilot.unlocks: only PREPARATION of a right-sized Stage-2 proposal; does NOT release the full fleet
binary_pilot.abort_criteria: RBFE-map plan: hysteresis <=0.5 kcal/leg; min adjacent-lambda MBAR overlap >=0.03; cycle closure <=1.0 kcal; Pocket-5 survival >=50% of windows

fixed_scope: 1 high-vs-low cooperativity VHL calibration comparison (preferably a structurally characterized SMARCA2 pair) -> morph legs calib_hi_to_lo__binary_vhl + calib_hi_to_lo__ternary_vhl (both needed for the Delta-alpha cycle)
active NR-V04 vs inactive epimer in binary VHL -> morph leg nrv04_active_to_epimer__binary_vhl
active NR-V04 vs inactive epimer in the NR4A1 ternary architecture -> morph leg nrv04_active_to_epimer__ternary_nr4a1
>=3 independent replicas + a minimally adequate lambda schedule (NOT single-trajectory endpoint scoring)
ternary_pilot.forecast_gate: the ternary MODE=plan forecast is authorized only AFTER the exact high/low Layer-1 pair + all pilot system identities, structures, microstates, transformations, replica count, and lambda schedule are frozen; the forecast must correspond to the ACTUAL fixed bundle, not a generic placeholder system
ternary_pilot.preflight: generate a MODE=plan dry-run GPU-hour forecast BEFORE production; if the defined pilot cannot fit under $200 without compromising replica count or convergence diagnostics -> STOP and return a revised costed scope (do NOT silently drop replicas)
ternary_pilot.rules: spot-only; pilot-one-leg-first; wait out spot capacity; checkpoint continuously

budget.crbn_gate: NR-V04 validates VHL recruitment ONLY. Flagship matrix is VHL-first. CRBN may be chemically enumerated but must NOT enter the flagship ranked set until a CRBN-specific positive/negative calibration + affinity control passes.

architecture_added_layers.1_separate_affinity_from_cooperativity: rank never on alpha alone; track the four quantities of method.two_reported_quantities
architecture_added_layers.2_ensemble_and_linker_strain: multiple co-fold architectures; multiple binary conformers; independent ternary MD replicas; cluster populations + pose exchange; linker strain vs unbound ensemble reported as a SEPARATE penalty/diagnostic (not via endpoint interface energy); PROTAC intramolecular contacts/folded populations; protonation/tautomer/charge sensitivity
architecture_added_layers.3_cullin_ring_ubiquitination: on FINALISTS: ensemble of VHL-EloBC + neddylated CUL2-RBX1 + E2~Ub + ternary target orientation; score solvent-exposed target lysines, Lys->E2~Ub transfer geometry, fraction of frames with >=1 transfer-competent lysine, persistence across CRL confs, NR4A1/2/3 differences, multiple-lysine robustness. Cheap geometric screening on all survivors; full CRL MD only for top ~3-5. NO claim a distance cutoff quantitatively predicts degradation.
architecture_added_layers.4_fusion_context: ubiquitination stage must not rely solely on isolated NR4A3 LBD; model EWSR1::NR4A3 breakpoint/domain context; report LBD-local ternary energetics, fusion-context ubiquitination geometry, and declared disordered-domain uncertainty SEPARATELY

required_controls: blinded control labels through completion of retrospective scoring
identical analysis + stopping rules for NR4A1/2/3
ternary residence-time = optional SECONDARY evidence, never a primary gate

promotion_and_claims.permitted_ceiling: NR4A3-selective degrader designs computationally PRIORITIZED by calibrated binary, ternary, and ubiquitination-geometry analyses (only when retrospective_bar fully passes AND the prospective matrix is built)
not_permitted: promoting denovo_401 or any warhead to 'lead'
standing_honesty: NR4A2 is the primary anti-target gate, NR4A1 provisional/unresolved
NR-V04 chemistry is a representative reconstruction until primary-source verified

final_dependency_chain: 3 ternary alchemical feasibility pilot: authorized under $200 cap
4 quantitative VHL calibration panel: required before prospective use
5 NR-V04 epimer + paralogue transfer: required before prospective NR4A ranking
6 selection-oriented binary RBFE tranche: conditionally releasable after binary pilot
7 VHL-only prospective degrader matrix: after both binary and ternary gates
8 full CRL2-E2~Ub lysine-presentation analysis: required on finalists
9 CRBN branch: held pending independent CRBN validation
10 manuscript claim: 'prioritized by calibrated ... analyses', never 'validated ... degraders'
